retention.player_retained.headline: ${team.name} retain marquee star ${player.name}
retention.player_retained.subhead: Franchise commits ${contract.salary} to keep ${player.primaryRole} ahead of auction
body: ${team.name} have confirmed the retention of ${player.name} on a ${contract.retentionTier}-tier contract worth ${contract.salary}.
The deal represents a ${contract.salaryDelta} change on the player's previous compensation and leaves the franchise with ${teamRetentionSummary.auctionPurseRemaining} of auction purse remaining.
${team.name} have retained ${teamRetentionSummary.totalRetained} players in total this off-season, releasing ${teamRetentionSummary.totalReleased} from their squad.

retention.player_retained.headline: ${player.name} retained by ${team.name}
body: ${team.name} have used a retention slot to keep ${player.name} ahead of the upcoming auction.
The ${player.primaryRole} signs on a ${contract.retentionTier}-tier deal worth ${contract.salary}, leaving the franchise with ${teamRetentionSummary.auctionPurseRemaining} of auction budget.

retention.player_released.headline: ${team.name} release ${player.name}
body: ${team.name} have opted not to retain ${player.name}, who will now enter the auction pool as a free agent.
The decision is part of ${team.name}'s wider squad restructure — ${teamRetentionSummary.totalReleased} players have been released this off-season.
